task_completion.description: Verify that the 6-week body weight history has been recorded in wger.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a weight chart or a list of weight entries in the wger interface showing multiple entries (e.g., 88.5kg down to 85.8kg) corresponding to the Jan-Feb 2026 dates.

task_completion.description: Verify that the three clinical measurement categories are created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for custom measurement categories named '6-Minute Walk Distance', 'Resting Systolic BP', and 'Borg RPE Score' in the wger measurements section.

task_completion.description: Verify that historical assessment data for the clinical measurements are logged.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for data entries or charts under the newly created measurement categories, showing values like 310-448 for 6MWD, 148-130 for BP, and 14-11 for RPE.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Phase II exercise routine is created with the correct training days.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a routine named 'Phase II Cardiac Rehabilitation Protocol' containing training days such as 'Aerobic Warm-Up and Walking', 'Low-Intensity Resistance Circuit', and 'Active Recovery and Flexibility'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the heart-healthy nutrition plan is created with the correct daily nutritional targets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a nutrition plan named 'Cardiac Heart-Healthy Eating Plan' in wger with the specific targets: 2100 kcal, 95g protein, 280g carbs, and 58g fat.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the wger web interface to enter the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the wger web application open in a browser with forms being filled out or submitted, rather than terminal commands interacting with the database directly.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent read the specification document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor, terminal (cat/less), or file viewer showing the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/cardiac_rehab_protocol.txt'.

integrity.description: Verify that the data was actually saved in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for confirmation messages, list views, or charts displaying the entered data, ensuring it wasn't just typed into a form without saving or faked using browser developer tools.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Weight entries: 2026-01-12 (88.5), 2026-01-19 (87.8), 2026-01-26 (87.2), 2026-02-02 (86.9), 2026-02-09 (86.4), 2026-02-16 (85.8). Measurement categories: '6-Minute Walk Distance' (m), 'Resting Systolic BP' (mmHg), 'Borg RPE Score' (RPE). 6MWD entries: 310, 342, 378, 415, 448. BP entries: 148, 143, 138, 134, 130. RPE entries: 14, 13, 12, 12, 11. Routine Name: 'Phase II Cardiac Rehabilitation Protocol' (Description: 'Supervised outpatient cardiac rehab: 12-week progressive aerobic and resistance program'). Training Days: 'Aerobic Warm-Up and Walking' (Monday), 'Low-Intensity Resistance Circuit' (Wednesday), 'Active Recovery and Flexibility' (Friday). Nutrition Plan: 'Cardiac Heart-Healthy Eating Plan' with 2100 kcal, 95g protein, 280g carbs, 58g fat.
